probes.name: refund-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms both migrations this module ships have run: refunds + refund_lines, plus their composite unique indexes.

probes.name: refund-unique-indexes-present
probes.description: Confirms the composite unique indexes exist: (tenant_id, refund_number) on refunds; (tenant_id, refund_id, invoice_line_id) on refund_lines. Missing any index risks duplicate refund_number generation OR double-refunding a single invoice line.

probes.name: refund-approvals-not-stale
probes.description: Warns when > 5 refunds sit in awaiting_approval > refund.approval.approval_sla_hours (default 24h). Actionable — consumer-protection-law SLAs risk breach. Fires per-tenant.

probes.name: refund-provider-errors-clearing
probes.description: Warns when > 20 refunds are stuck in status='provider_error' > refund.reconciliation.stale_provider_error_threshold_hours (default 24h). Indicates ReconcileRefundsJob has stalled OR a provider is systemically failing.

probes.name: refund-finalization-chain-clean
probes.description: Reads stackra.refund.finalization_failures_total counter. Any non-zero value in the last 24h is a P1 signal — FinalizeRefundJob failed to complete the credit-note + transaction + clawback + marketing chain, leaving a succeeded refund with orphan side effects.

probes.name: refund-succeeded-orphans-clean
probes.description: Detects refunds in status='succeeded' with credit_note_id IS NULL OR transaction_id IS NULL — the finalization chain partially failed. Warn signal, actionable via refund:generate-credit-note admin CLI.

probes.name: refund-reconciler-recent
probes.description: Confirms ReconcileRefundsJob completed within the last 25 hours (nightly cadence + 1h slop). Stale reconciler indicates scheduler drift.

probes.name: refund-provider-manager-healthy
probes.description: Delegates to payment::PaymentProviderManager health check. Refund can't dispatch if payment providers are down. Warn when any provider circuit breaker is open.

probes.name: refund-clawback-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 10 RefundClawbackReferral / RefundClawbackCoupon events are stuck in the queue > 30 min. Indicates downstream referrals/coupon modules are failing to process cascades.
